category_sources: source_facts.description says imgdiet optimizes and resizes images.

docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SourceHut repository; no separate docs URL is supplied, so the repository README/homepage is the best official documentation surface.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies image optimization and resizing; source_facts.source-archive path names the Go source project imgdiet-go.
